plugins.name: session-capture
plugins.description: Save the entire Claude Code session transcript into a chosen Hillnote workspace as a dated document.

plugins.name: response-capture
plugins.description: Save the last user question and Claude's answer into a chosen Hillnote workspace as a dated document.

plugins.name: kanban-board
plugins.description: Parse the last Claude answer for TODO items and turn them into a kanban board in a chosen Hillnote workspace.
